testcase.name: bookingFlow
testcase.failure: org.openqa.selenium.TimeoutException: Expected condition failed: waiting for element to be clickable: By.xpath: //input[@placeholder='Where are you going?'] (tried for 10 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.20.0', revision: '866c76ca80' System info: os.name: 'Windows 10', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '15.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 146.0.7680.178, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 146.0.7680.165 (4b989da09e1..., userDataDir: C:\Users\Lenovo\AppData\Loc...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:64112}, goog:processID: 19684, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:64112/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 146.0.7680.178, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: f81716fea2e3d143f89171f6e59ae982 at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.WebDriverWait.timeoutException(WebDriverWait.java:84) at org.openqa.selenium.support.ui.FluentWait.until(FluentWait.java:228) at pages.HomePage.enterDestination(HomePage.java:34) at Tests.BookingTest.bookingFlow(BookingTest.java:21) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.Executors$RunnableAdapter.call(Executors.java:515) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.FutureTask.run(FutureTask.java:264) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor.runWorker(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:1130) at java.base/java.util.concurrent.ThreadPoolExecutor$Worker.run(ThreadPoolExecutor.java:630) at java.base/java.lang.Thread.run(Thread.java:832) ...
